headline: Renewable Energy Stocks Q1 Results: Benchmarking First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR)
summary: Looking back on renewable energy stocks’ Q1 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) and its peers.
